articles.title: 科特迪瓦球员埃利·瓦希因假球被捕
articles.summary: 美国广播公司新闻 (ABC News) 周三证实，正在参加 2026 年世界杯的科特迪瓦球员埃利·瓦希 (Eye Wahi) 因涉嫌在比赛开始前几周进行假球而被捕。
articles.originalTitle: Ivory Coast's Elye Wahi arrested for spot-fixing
articles.originalSummary: Ivory Coast's Elye Wahi, who is playing at the 2026 World Cup, was arrested for alleged spot-fixing just a couple of weeks before the tournament began, ABC News confirmed on Wednesday.
